body.text:
{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220332312225FFCE3B9E40156311"}"},"total":10221},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7529105356004246296","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"神作！看了这本小说仿佛大脑皮层的褶皱被瞬间抚平了、拉展了，有股瞬间的放松，就像漫步在挪威的森林，邀游在三亚的太平洋，感觉自己又像是一只灵动的蝴蝶，吮吸雨后的第一滴甘露，携着几条狗，坐在草原上，遥眺着水平线，整个人犹如化成一滩潭水，缓缓流逝，慢慢平静，感受春日和熙的长风掠过贝加尔湖畔，如青涩少女情到深处的吻般吹拂脸颊，平躺下来，使温暖柔和的阳光覆盖全身，缓缓闭上双眼，将自身与整个世界融合，让感官与那长风，那光明相连，于广阔的天地之间纵情邀游。剧情非常奇幻。证明作者非常有想象力。这本书名子引人入胜，吸引读者。…点面结合，使整本书生动。具体，详略得当。整本书虽然并不华丽，但却极为准确生动，情感丰富而真实，读来津津有味。这本书的结构简洁合理，作者对书的理解也十分深刻透彻。整本书语调轻松幽默，显得妙趣横生，读来令人爱不释手…","text_exts":[{"e":47,"s":42,"text":"挪威的森林","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%8C%AA%E5%A8%81%E7%9A%84%E6%A3%AE%E6%9E%97&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177412155140156311%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227529105356004246296%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227349472831089953816%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%8C%AA%E5%A8%81%E7%9A%84%E6%A3%AE%E6%9E%97%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753010011,"group_id":"7349472831089953816","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"巴尔泽布，别叫了，从今天起，我也是漂泊者呀！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3oNb/yJufWQ7KTIcbxsLw4WYb6HiMrWRO4HE/y/JOu6","gender":1,"is_cancelled":true,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1044982968096250","user_name":"用户10449829"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1044982968096250","user_relation":{"can_follow":false,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7349472831089953816","book_info":{"abstract":"应渊一觉醒来，穿越到了洪荒昆仑山。
成为了天地初开，孽障之力化形的孽龙。
先天孽龙，孽障深厚，业力加身，人教不收，阐教喊打喊杀的嫌弃，四海龙族不认。
无奈之下，只能拜入截教，当个外门记名弟子。
日记系统，宛若神降。
只要每天写日记，就能变强。
应渊就想着一直猥琐发育，偷偷写日记成长。
却没想到洪荒所有事情都出乎了意料。
量劫当中，通天教主，是怎么算到大战将启，十大金乌坠东海，并收留了小金乌陆压？
还踏马扶持陆压建立了妖庭？伪天庭？宣称正统？
不对劲！崆峒印怎么跑通天教主手里去了？
册封布局三皇五帝，谋划人族文道之师，这还是坦率、鲁莽、毫无城府的通天教主吗？
应渊愈发摸不准洪荒的走向，但知道封神后截教道统会覆灭！
于是萌发了等着西方教来挖人‘叛教’后成佛作祖的想法。
只是一个外门记名弟子的应渊，却被一路提拔成为了截教小教主？
“谁懂啊？我真的不想当小教主啊！”
直至，封神前夕，准提果断拒绝，“应渊道友，你与我西方真的无缘。”
应渊：“万物皆与西方有缘，唯独我应渊与西方无缘是吧？”
“好！好！好！西方欺我太甚！”
万仙大阵中，应渊摇旗呐喊：“众师兄，生为截教仙，死为截教雄，生死皆为截教仙！随师弟我送西方教弟子上榜封神！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c95ea3c1a4828357217b5a046418868e","author":"暴走的葡式蛋挞","author_id":"","book_id":"7349472831089953816","book_name":"孽师听我指挥，我带截教无敌洪荒","book_short_name":"龙渊日记","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"10.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":731,"name":"封神","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=731&name=封神&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7349472873280455192","read_count":"103511","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2039909"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"924","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,洪荒,架空,东方玄幻,同人,封神","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/95c4c78102b7a7b453f60f3d075c8cfe~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779305551&x-signature=yWn8Cjd2%2BCaz9iciWNUJjtX%2B6Pg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"277500988491640","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1331"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220332312225FFCE3B9E40156311"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读83小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":55,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":201766,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":298822,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":58890},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7402679785276637977","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看强推，剧情挺紧凑，文笔也挺不错的，还有轻松搞笑的内容，除了中间那里主角还一直想着西方这个有一点毒可能有一些人会跑，不过再坚持几章就行了，没几章就决定留在截教，也发现孽师看到日记，总体来讲还是不错的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723576468,"group_id":"7349472831089953816","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"生的最后一笔也是死的第一笔","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9eGf4DPntgppbJvRIfH1o5yMCVTs2XUQTbJezvs6ofU","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/aef0137b82454833a9f59d30db9be675~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707370&x-signature=xPOx20ZaIwUElRmg70z%2BgqIwCHI%3D","user_id":"3967478961287463","user_name":"鲲星"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3967478961287463","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1770965383,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":33,"name":"巅峰品鉴官","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-stat ct":"应渊一觉醒来，穿越到了洪荒昆仑山。

先天孽龙，孽障深厚，业力加身，人教不收，阐教喊打喊杀的嫌弃，四海龙族不认。

应渊：“万物皆与西方有缘，唯独我应渊与西方无缘是吧？”
“好！好！好！西方欺我太甚！”
